0110101011111110000000110010 - ASI: 17

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  100 = 1 * 00
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0010 = 00 * 10
  0101 = 01 * 01
  1111 = 11 * 11
  0110010 = 011 * 0010
  0110101 = 011 * 0101
  0111111 = 011 * 1111
  1000000 = 100 * 0000
  01101010111111 = 0110101 * 0111111
  10000000110010 = 1000000 * 0110010
  0110101011111110000000110010 = 01101010111111 * 10000000110010
